page_content:
Prerequisite: BSCI170 and BSCI171; or BSCI105.

Credit Only Granted for: BSCI223 or BSC1I283.

BSCI238 Special Topics in Biology Student Initiated Courses (1 Credit) Student Initiated Course (STIC) in Biology. Course will be student initiated and taught under close supervision of faculty mentor. Student instructor and faculty mentor must generate proposal and have approval of the Biological Sciences Program to offer a BSCI238 STIC. BSCI238 cannot be applied to the degree requirements of any biological sciences major. Repeatable to: 5 credits if content differs.
